name: Robin T31 CYC

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: CF123978-8BB9-4904-B8A7-248E6DF68477

comment:
Robin T31™ CYC : Designed in collaboration with the world‘s leading lighting designers, opera houses and theatres, the T31 Cyc™ -half length version of the T32 Cyc™ features all the performance, tools, subtlety, and control to make your designs more exciting and visually stimulating than ever before.
Attaining greater reach, smoother coverage and visual impact than ever before from LED luminaires of this type, the low-laying, easily inter-connectable T31 Cyc™ contains powerful RGBBAL multi-chip LEDs to generate not only high light levels but also faithfully reproduce those full-spectrum colours and tints favoured by designers across the world.

The industry-leading Opti-6™ - 6:1 height-to-distance ratio optical design, with a classic asymmetric beam, provides greater, smoother reach and coverage, even from close proximity to the cyclorama, leaving more stage space for performers. The shorter length eases the lighting of curved cycloramas.

capabilities.comment: Quiet mode Fans ON at blackout
Quiet mode Fans OFF at blackout
Rainbow effect (with fade time) from slow-> fast
Rainbow effect (without fade time) from slow-> fast
Multiply mode (multiply Virtual and Colour mix)
Crossfade between Virtual and Colour mix
Time of beam movement Min to Max (1 - 25 sec)
